title: Outline Artifact Content
description: Studio Outline (and CLI `specs outline`) need a single parser entry point that turns **raw artifact bytes** into navigable outline trees without requiring a workspace spec or change file on disk. `outlineArtifactContent` centralizes format inference, parse, and `outline()` so `GetSpecOutline` and `OutlineChangeArtifact` do not duplicate parser wiring.
context: Studio Outline (and CLI `specs outline`) need a single parser entry point that turns **raw artifact bytes** into navigable outline trees without requiring a workspace spec or change file on disk. `outlineArtifactContent` centralizes format inference, parse, and `outline()` so `GetSpecOutline` and `OutlineChangeArtifact` do not duplicate parser wiring.

rules.requirement: input is content and filename only
rules: The function MUST accept `content` (string), `filename` (for extension / format inference), `ArtifactParserRegistry`, and optional `{ full?, hints? }`. It MUST NOT read the filesystem.

rules.requirement: output matches spec outline entry shape
rules: The result MUST include `filename`, `outline` (readonly tree), and optional `selectorHints` when `hints: true`.
When `inferFormat(filename)` fails or no parser is registered, the function MUST throw `ParserNotRegisteredError` with the filename in the message.
Parser `parse` failures MUST propagate to callers (HTTP layer maps to problem+json).

scenarios.requirement: input is content and filename only
scenarios.name: Markdown content yields section outline
then: outline entries include a section for Requirements

scenarios.requirement: input is content and filename only
scenarios.name: Unknown extension throws

scenarios.requirement: output matches spec outline entry shape
scenarios.name: Hints optional
then: selectorHints is present when parser provides hints

scenarios.name: unknown format throws ParserNotRegisteredError — primary path
when: When inferFormat(filename) fails or no parser is registered,
then: AND no forbidden side effects occur

scenarios.name: unknown format throws ParserNotRegisteredError — guard path
given: inputs that stress the requirement boundary
then: errors or skips are explicit and documented

scenarios.name: parse errors propagate — primary path
when: Parser parse failures MUST propagate to callers (HTTP
